potential_hallucinations.requirement: The system shall pause a campaign at any time, stopping all adverts, and later resume it to continue work.
The system shall make adjustments if the payment does not match the required amount.

missing_requirements.evidence_quote: Once it is approved and the contract is signed, it becomes active.
missing_requirements.suggested_requirement: The system shall activate a campaign once it is approved and the contract is signed.

hallucinations.rewritten_requirement: The system shall calculate the costs and prepare a final statement if the campaign is cancelled.
hallucinations.reason: The source text mentions that the system calculates the costs and prepares a final statement when the campaign is cancelled, but it does not explicitly state that this should only happen in case of cancellation.

ambiguities.rewritten_requirement: The system shall complete the campaign and prepare a final statement once all activities are finished.
ambiguities.reason: This requirement is ambiguous as it does not specify whether this should happen when the campaign is cancelled or completed normally.

prompt:
You are a strict requirements validator.
Compare rewritten requirements against the source text.

Return ONLY valid JSON with this schema:
{
  "missing_requirements": [
    {
      "evidence_quote": "string",
      "suggested_requirement": "The system shall ..."
    }
  ],
  "hallucinations": [
    {
      "rewritten_requirement": "string",
      "reason": "string"
    }
  ],
  "duplicates": [
    {
      "requirement_a": "string",
      "requirement_b": "string",
      "reason": "string"
    }
  ],
  "ambiguities": [
    {
      "rewritten_requirement": "string",
      "reason": "string"
    }
  ],
  "overall_assessment": "pass|needs_review"
}

Source text:
<<<
A campaign starts after a manager and staff are assigned. Once it is approved and the contract is signed, it becomes active.

While running, the campaign involves two main activities. Surveys can be carried out and evaluated, and adverts are prepared, approved, scheduled, and then run. The campaign can also be adjusted if needed, such as extending it or changing the budget.

The campaign may be paused at any time, stopping all adverts, and later resumed to continue work.

If the campaign is cancelled, the system calculates the costs and prepares a final statement. Otherwise, once all activities are finished, the campaign is completed and a final statement is prepared.

After that, payment is handled. If the payment does not match the required amount, adjustments are made. Once everything is settled, the campaign is marked as paid.

Finally, the campaign is archived and all assigned staff and managers are released.
>>>

Rewritten requirements JSON:
{
  "rewritten_requirements": [
    "The system shall start a campaign after a manager and staff are assigned.",
    "The system shall activate a campaign once it is approved and the contract is signed.",
    "The system shall allow surveys to be carried out and evaluated during the campaign.",
    "The system shall prepare, approve, schedule, and run adverts during the campaign.",
    "The system shall allow adjusting the campaign if needed, such as extending it or changing the budget.",
    "The system shall pause a campaign at any time, stopping all adverts, and later resume it to continue work.",
    "The system shall calculate the costs and prepare a final statement if the campaign is cancelled.",
    "The system shall complete the campaign and prepare a final statement once all activities are finished.",
    "The system shall handle payment after the campaign is completed.",
    "The system shall make adjustments if the payment does not match the required amount.",
    "The system shall mark the campaign as paid once everything is settled.",
    "The system shall archive the campaign and release all assigned staff and managers after it is completed."
  ]
}
